channel.title: FASS Flow Product Updates
channel.description: A running changelog of real features shipped on FASS Flow.

item.title: Opportunity Workspace — one screen for the whole bid
item.description: WARDOG, R-E-A-D, and Pipeline now open into a single Opportunity Workspace with a real fit score, win probability, and competition read in the header.
item.guid: GovCon Tools|Opportunity Workspace — one screen for the whole bid

item.title: AI Chief-of-Staff — ask your business a question
item.description: A query box on the Dashboard answers plain-language questions about your own account activity instead of making you dig through reports.
item.guid: Dashboard|AI Chief-of-Staff — ask your business a question

item.title: Pipeline: a self-checking bid checklist
item.description: Opportunities you're pursuing show up as an ordered, self-checking checklist with a progress bar.
item.guid: GovCon Tools|Pipeline: a self-checking bid checklist

item.title: Capture solicitations straight from the browser
item.description: A Chrome extension reads solicitation pages and sends them directly into your FASS Flow Inbox.
item.guid: GovCon Tools|Capture solicitations straight from the browser

item.title: AI deal scoring on every opportunity
item.description: WARDOG and the Opportunity Workspace show an AI-generated win-likelihood score and a Win-Delta badge on every contract.
item.guid: GovCon Tools|AI deal scoring on every opportunity

item.title: Full solicitation text, captured automatically
item.description: Saving an opportunity pulls the complete solicitation description and attached PDFs into FASS Flow directly.
item.guid: GovCon Tools|Full solicitation text, captured automatically

item.title: Wider NAICS search + more results per search
item.description: A searchable NAICS code picker and a larger per-search result set with load-more pagination.
item.guid: GovCon Tools|Wider NAICS search + more results per search

item.title: Careers page launched
item.description: A public Careers page with real open roles and an in-app application flow.
item.guid: Company|Careers page launched

item.title: Growth Challenge: gamified milestones
item.description: Tracks real account milestones and rewards progress automatically.
item.guid: Growth|Growth Challenge: gamified milestones

item.title: Group and teaming threads in Messenger
item.description: Threads with three or more participants for subcontracting and teaming.
item.guid: Networking|Group and teaming threads in Messenger

item.title: Capability-based people search
item.description: Search by NAICS code, certification, or past performance to find teaming partners.
item.guid: Networking|Capability-based people search

item.title: Business Profiles
item.description: Public profile pages showing verified capabilities, certifications, and activity.
item.guid: Networking|Business Profiles

item.title: Messenger v2: attachments, reactions, push notifications
item.description: File attachments, emoji reactions, message editing, read receipts, typing indicators, real push notifications.
item.guid: Messenger|Messenger v2: attachments, reactions, push notifications

item.title: Share opportunities, proposals, and posts into chat
item.description: WARDOG opportunities, R-E-A-D analyses, Team Up posts, and Passport cards shareable as live cards in Messenger.
item.guid: Messenger|Share opportunities, proposals, and posts into chat

item.title: Digital gift cards with Apple Wallet passes
item.description: Public storefront, real Apple Wallet pass delivery, full redemption history.
item.guid: Wallet|Digital gift cards with Apple Wallet passes

item.title: Push loyalty offers to Apple Wallet
item.description: Send offers and updated rewards directly to a customer's Apple Wallet pass.
item.guid: Wallet|Push loyalty offers to Apple Wallet

item.title: Stamp cards and rewards programs
item.description: Digital stamp/rewards cards, tap-to-join, in-person redemption.
item.guid: Wallet|Stamp cards and rewards programs

item.title: Stripe Connect payouts
item.description: Businesses connect their own Stripe account for direct payouts on gift card and wallet sales.
item.guid: Payments|Stripe Connect payouts

item.title: Comms Hub
item.description: A single threaded inbox for customer SMS conversations with nudge alerts.
item.guid: Operations|Comms Hub

item.title: Team Up
item.description: A partner network board and live chat for GovCon teaming.
item.guid: Operations|Team Up

item.title: Affiliate Program with gamified dashboard
item.description: Referral commissions, levels, and recruiting tracked through a dedicated dashboard.
item.guid: Affiliates|Affiliate Program with gamified dashboard

item.title: Business Health score + AI daily brief
item.description: Dashboard surfaces a health score from real activity plus an AI-written daily summary.
item.guid: Dashboard|Business Health score + AI daily brief

item.title: New site, new look
item.description: Rebuilt public site: animated landing page, About, Press, and Blog.
item.guid: Company|New site, new look
